title: Beehiiv vs Brevo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Beehiiv and Brevo email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which fits your needs best.
h1: Beehiiv vs Brevo: A Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Beehiiv and Brevo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and use cases. Beehiiv focuses on newsletter publishers seeking monetization opportunities, while Brevo offers a broader all-in-one CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities. Choosing between them depends on whether you prioritize newsletter growth or omnichannel marketing automation.

comparison_table.tool_a: Ad network, referral program, web reader
comparison_table.tool_b: Transactional email API, SMS, WhatsApp, live chat

comparison_table.tool_a: Individual newsletter creators and media operators
comparison_table.tool_b: Businesses needing transactional email and multi-channel outreach

choose_a_if: You're building a newsletter business and want built-in monetization tools
You need a dedicated ad network and referral program to grow your audience
You prefer a platform purpose-built for newsletter publishers
choose_b_if: You need a free tier that supports up to 100,000 subscribers
You require multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat) alongside email
You need transactional email capabilities and CRM functionality for ecommerce or SaaS
You want lower starting costs for paid plans

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Beehiiv excels for newsletter creators seeking monetization and growth tools, while Brevo is superior for businesses requiring multi-channel marketing and transactional email capabilities. Brevo also offers significantly better value on the free tier with 100,000 subscribers vs. Beehiiv's 2,500.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Beehiiv or Brevo?
faq.a: Brevo is cheaper overall. Brevo starts at $25/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month, and Brevo's free tier is dramatically larger with 100,000 included subscribers versus Beehiiv's 2,500. For budget-conscious users, Brevo offers exceptional value, especially if you don't immediately need premium features.

faq.q: Can I switch from Brevo to Beehiiv?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate your subscriber list from Brevo to Beehiiv. Both platforms support standard CSV exports and imports, making the transition straightforward. However, note that Beehiiv's free tier only supports 2,500 subscribers, so large lists may require an immediate paid plan upgrade.
